executable.title: TRIDENT Embeddings
executable.description: Generate patch-level and slide-level embeddings from a directory of whole-slide images using the TRIDENT pipeline (tissue segmentation, patch extraction, feature extraction). All paths refer to container-internal paths; model checkpoints must be pre-downloaded and mounted into the container.
executable.acknowledgements: TRIDENT by the Mahmood Lab, Harvard Medical School.

string-enumeration.name: task
string-enumeration.label: Task
string-enumeration.description: Pipeline stage(s) to run. "all" runs segmentation, patch extraction, and feature extraction end-to-end.

string.name: wsi_dir
string.label: WSI Source Directory
string.description: Container-internal path to the directory containing whole-slide image files.

string.name: job_dir
string.label: Output Directory
string.description: Container-internal path where all pipeline outputs (segmentation masks, patch coordinates, embeddings) will be saved.

parameters.label: Patch Encoder
parameters.description: Foundation model for generating patch-level feature embeddings

string-enumeration.name: patch_encoder
string-enumeration.label: Patch Encoder Model
string-enumeration.description: Foundation model for patch-level feature extraction. Recommended patch size and magnification vary by model — see guidance in the UI.

string.name: patch_encoder_ckpt_path
string.label: Patch Encoder Checkpoint Path
string.description: Container-internal path to a locally downloaded model checkpoint file (.pt, .pth, .bin, or .safetensors). Leave empty to download automatically (requires network access).

parameters.label: Patching
parameters.description: Patch extraction parameters (used when task is coords or all)

integer.name: mag
integer.label: Magnification
integer.description: Target magnification level at which patches are extracted.

integer.name: patch_size
integer.label: Patch Size (pixels)
integer.description: Size of each extracted patch in pixels (square). Recommended values vary by encoder model.

integer.name: overlap
integer.label: Patch Overlap (pixels)
integer.description: Pixel overlap between adjacent patches. 0 means no overlap.

double.name: min_tissue_proportion
double.label: Minimum Tissue Proportion
double.description: Minimum fraction of tissue required to keep a patch (0.0 to 1.0). Patches with less tissue than this threshold are discarded.

string.name: coords_dir
string.label: Patch Coordinates Directory
string.description: Container-internal path for saving/restoring patch coordinates. Leave empty to auto-generate based on magnification and patch size settings.

string-enumeration.name: saveas
string-enumeration.label: Output Format
string-enumeration.description: File format for saving embedding features.

parameters.label: Segmentation
parameters.description: Tissue segmentation parameters (used when task is seg or all)

string-enumeration.name: segmenter
string-enumeration.label: Segmenter Model
string-enumeration.description: Model used for tissue segmentation. "hest" (DeepLabV3) works for most stain types. "grandqc" is faster and optimised for H&E.

double.name: seg_conf_thresh
double.label: Segmentation Confidence Threshold
double.description: Confidence threshold for binarizing tissue predictions (0.0 to 1.0). Lower values retain more tissue; try 0.4 if tissue is being under-segmented.

boolean.name: remove_holes
boolean.label: Remove Holes in Tissue
boolean.description: Fill holes within tissue regions during segmentation.

boolean.name: remove_artifacts
boolean.label: Remove Artifacts
boolean.description: Run the artifact removal model to exclude staining artifacts and debris.

boolean.name: remove_penmarks
boolean.label: Remove Pen Marks
boolean.description: Remove pen markings from the tissue mask.

parameters.label: Slide Encoder
parameters.description: Optional slide-level embedding (used in addition to patch embeddings)

string-enumeration.name: slide_encoder
string-enumeration.label: Slide Encoder Model
string-enumeration.description: Optional model for generating a single slide-level feature vector. Select "none" to skip slide-level encoding.

string.name: slide_encoder_ckpt_path
string.label: Slide Encoder Checkpoint Path
string.description: Container-internal path to a locally downloaded slide encoder checkpoint file. Leave empty to download automatically.

integer.name: gpu
integer.label: GPU Index
integer.description: Index of the GPU to use for inference. Use -1 for CPU (slow).

integer.name: batch_size
integer.label: Default Batch Size
integer.description: Default batch size for segmentation and feature extraction. Can be overridden per stage.

integer.name: seg_batch_size
integer.label: Segmentation Batch Size
integer.description: Batch size for segmentation inference. 0 uses the default batch size.

integer.name: feat_batch_size
integer.label: Feature Extraction Batch Size
integer.description: Batch size for feature extraction inference. 0 uses the default batch size.

integer.name: max_workers
integer.label: Max Workers
integer.description: Maximum number of concurrent data-loading workers. 0 means auto-detect.

boolean.name: skip_errors
boolean.label: Skip Errors
boolean.description: Continue processing remaining slides if an error occurs on one slide.

boolean.name: search_nested
boolean.label: Search Nested Directories
boolean.description: Recursively search subdirectories of the WSI source directory for slide files.

parameters.label: WSI Source Options
parameters.description: Advanced options for WSI file discovery and reading

string.name: wsi_ext
string.label: WSI File Extensions
string.description: Comma-separated list of allowed file extensions (e.g., ".svs,.ndpi,.tif"). Leave empty to accept all supported formats.

string-enumeration.name: reader_type
string-enumeration.label: WSI Reader
string-enumeration.description: Force a specific WSI reader engine. "auto" selects based on file extension.

string.name: custom_mpp_keys
string.label: Custom MPP Metadata Keys
string.description: Comma-separated list of metadata keys to use for reading microns-per-pixel (MPP) from WSI metadata. Useful for non-standard formats.

string.name: custom_list_of_wsis
string.label: Custom WSI List (CSV)
string.description: Container-internal path to a CSV file listing specific WSI filenames to process. Leave empty to process all files in the source directory.

string.name: wsi_cache
string.label: WSI Cache Directory
string.description: Container-internal path to a fast local disk (e.g., SSD) for staging WSI files before processing. Improves throughput when the source is on slow storage.

integer.name: cache_batch_size
integer.label: Cache Batch Size
integer.description: Maximum number of slides to stage in the WSI cache at once.
